sections.name: Key Decisions
items: **No Canva auto-graphics** — dashboard replaces it
**No Telegram for alerts** — SMS first (SimpleTexting), then email, then DMs
**EV ratio uses actual selling price, NOT MSRP**
**ALWAYS use publish-report.js** for report delivery
Matthew wants to try stock/crypto trading ($750 stocks + $300 crypto) — waiting on account setup

subsections.name: Capabilities Improvements Identified
items: **Issue:** Raw API errors (context limit exceeded) leaking to Matthew via Telegram
**Fix Applied:** Tightened compaction thresholds (softTrimRatio 0.6→0.5, hardClearRatio 0.7→0.6, memoryFlush 50k→40k tokens)
**Follow-up:** Filed GitHub issue #9951 for proper error handling in Clawdbot framework
**Current:** Following HEARTBEAT.md protocol strictly - good discipline
**Opportunity:** Many tasks require Matthew input/clarification - need better async work identification
**Next:** Create separate "Dross Solo Work" category for tasks that don't need Matthew
**Issue:** Spreadsheet interface complexity preventing full automation
**Current:** Manual intervention required for updates
**Opportunity:** Direct Google Sheets API calls instead of browser automation
**Status:** Partially automated, needs technical solution for table updates
**Good:** Two-project system (Active Sprint vs Backlog) provides clear prioritization
**Issue:** Many tasks stack up requiring Matthew decisions/approvals
**Opportunity:** Better task intake classification (solo vs collaborative vs blocked)

subsections.name: Vapi Phone Integration Research
items: **Recommended for BnB AI phone line** - Cleanest setup, ~$0.05/min
**Free tier available**: Free US phone numbers (up to 10/wallet), $10 trial credits
**Setup path**: docs.vapi.ai/free-telephony → "Phone Numbers" → "Create a Phone Number" → "Free Vapi Number"
Numbers take couple minutes to activate after creation
Could deploy same day once Matthew sets up account
Alternatives researched: Twilio (no free tier), Google Voice (manual), Bland AI, Retell AI

sections.name: Heartbeat Work Summary
rawText: 1. **Daily standup check** (P3) - completed routine standup, confirmed API endpoints working fine (MacGyver reported false API issues)
2. **Inbox monitoring for stale unassigned tasks** (P2) - built `stale-inbox-monitor.js` script:
- Monitors unassigned inbox tasks >4h old
- Suggests assignments based on bot domain mapping
- Alerts during active hours only (8 AM - Midnight EST)
- Includes bot domain keywords for smart routing

subsections.name: Token Tracking Issue
items: After weekly reset (Monday 4 PM), bots weren't reporting tokens
**Root cause:** Heartbeats need to include `token_burn_session` field
**Fix:** Each bot must POST heartbeat with token estimate
Created `scripts/token-tracker.js` utility for local accumulation
OpenClaw doesn't expose cumulative session tokens — have to estimate from context × 1.5

subsections.name: Bot Git Emails (for Vercel deploys)
items: Bots have git emails: `wit@breaknbad.com`, `macgyver@breaknbad.ai`, `big-brother@breaknbad.ai`
When merging bot branches, must run `git commit --amend --reset-author` before pushing
Otherwise Vercel rejects (bot emails not on Vercel team)
This is why some deploys fail with bot email errors

subsections.name: Review Column Purpose
items: **Review** = "done but needs human check" before closing
Workflow: Bot completes → Review → Human verifies → Done
Prevents bots from auto-closing things that need human eyes

rawText: **Problem:** Missing Python dependency (`pdfplumber`) caused invoice processor to silently fail for days.
**Impact:** Matthew paid $49k invoice but remittance email wasn't sent because completed task wasn't detected.
**Root cause:** Cron used snapshot-based detection, but if cron fails, completed tasks get lost.
**Solutions implemented:**
1. Installed missing `pdfplumber` Python package
2. Manually processed invoice 312110131767 ($48,975) - marked PAID and sent remittance email
3. Updated remittance script: ACH → wire transfer (how BnB actually pays)
4. Created P1 task for Matthew to fix email layout
**Process improvements needed:**

- `ground_truth_pct` (weekly %)

- `ground_truth_updated_at`

session_status tracking only sees tokens through OpenClaw — misses direct claude.ai usage. Ground truth from the console is the real number.
Multiple build failures fixed:
1. **pages/ directory conflict** - Next.js can't have both `pages/` and `src/app/`. Removed rogue `pages/api/` that kept getting recreated.
2. **TypeScript error** - Supabase queries don't have `.catch()`, changed to try/catch
3. **Fleet usage math** - Changed from SUM to MAX for fleet totals (each account has separate limits, summing is meaningless)

sections.name: Handoff System Implemented (5:11 PM)
items: `node scripts/handoff.js create --from dross --to wit --task "description"`
`node scripts/handoff.js deliver --id ho-xxxxx`
`node scripts/handoff.js confirm --id ho-xxxxx`
`node scripts/handoff.js check --bot <name>`
`node scripts/handoff.js list --stale`
rawText: Created `scripts/handoff.js` for bot-to-bot handoff tracking after dropping the ball on Wit's brand materials.
**Workflow:**
1. `create` — when committing to deliver something to another bot
2. `deliver` — when you've completed your part
3. `confirm` — receiving bot confirms they got what they need
4. Big Brother monitors for stale handoffs (>4hrs pending during active hours)
**Commands:**
Data stored in `data/handoffs.json`
**Action:** Add handoff creation to my workflow whenever I commit to something for another bot. Check for pending handoffs in heartbeats.
